ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last date and time the user was active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "started_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Last action on the topic (e.g., last post) */,
  "last_post_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the last post */,
  "last_post_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last post */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the topic */,
  "views_last_24h" INTEGER /* Number of views in the last 24 hours */,
  "replies_last_24h" INTEGER /* Number of replies in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_started_by FOREIGN KEY ("started_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_last_post_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_post_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the reply is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "content_html" TEXT /* HTML content of the reply */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Attachment associated with the reply (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the reply */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the reply */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, edit, delete) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "activity_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user when performing the activity */,
  "activity_browser" TEXT /* Browser and version used by the user */,
  "activity_os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., delete post, lock topic) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderator action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user subscribing to the topic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being subscribed to */,
  "subscribed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user subscribed to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for email notifications (true/false) */,
  "dark_mode" INTEGER /* Preference for dark mode (true/false) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the interface */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone for date and time display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role (if applicable) */,
  "permissions_list" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
